title: Herb and Flaky Crumble Pie
description: A delicious and indulgent pie filled with a savory herb mixture topped with a crumbly flaky crust.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and place in a pie dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the herb mixture, sugar (if using), and a pinch of salt.
Pour the herb mixture into the pie crust.
Roll out the remaining pastry and use to cover the pie.
Crimp the edges to seal and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Brush the egg wash over the top of the pie.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Let the pie cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
